message:
chore(deps): refresh Cargo.lock for asupersync 0.3.1

Companion to the 0.3.0 → 0.3.1 Cargo.toml bump (concurrent agent
already landed the .toml change in a prior commit; this refreshes
the lockfile to resolve asupersync at the new version).

files.patch:
